stemHtml: Regarding the use of the words "Over" and/or "Out", which of the following is correct?

options.a: "Over" and "out" are never used in aeronautical communications.
options.b: "Over" and "out" are ICAO standard terminology but are not used in VHF communications.
options.c: "Over" and "out" are not ICAO standard terminology but may occasionally be heard in aeronautical communications.
options.d: “Over” has to be used at the end of every VHF transmission to indicate that the transmission is over and that an answer is expected.
